---
author: "geol"
subtitle: "Automated Technology Lifecycle Audit"
date: last-modified
description: "End-of-Life analysis for software components based on endoflife.date API."
keywords: [EOL, Security, Compliance, DevOps]
params:
  config_file: ".geol.yaml"
  additional_context: ""
format: 
  html:
    theme:
      dark: darkly
      light: flatly
    quarto-color-scheme:
      default: dark
      toggle: true
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free@6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.7/css/jquery.dataTables.min.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.2/css/buttons.dataTables.min.css">
        <style>
        body.quarto-dark { background-color: #222 !important; color: #eee !important; }
        .quarto-dark .metric-card { background: #2d2d2d; border: 1px solid #444; }
        
        .thead-dark th { background-color: #333 !important; }
        .fa-circle-check { color: #50fa7b !important; }
        .fa-circle-exclamation { color: #ff5555 !important; }
        .fa-circle-question { color: #8be9fd !important; }
        .fa-triangle-exclamation { color: #ffb86c !important; }
        
        .metric-card {
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 20px;
            text-align: center;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            min-height: 140px;
        }
        .metric-icon {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            opacity: 0.8;
        }
        .metric-value {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: bold;
            display: block;
        }
        .metric-label {
            font-size: 1rem;
            color: #aaa;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }
        .status-ok { color: #50fa7b !important; }
        .status-eol { color: #ff5555 !important; }
        .status-skip { color: #8be9fd !important; }
        .status-warning { color: #ffb86c !important; }
        
        .finding-box {
            padding: 15px 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin: 20px 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 15px;
            border-left: 5px solid;
        }
        .finding-critical {
            background-color: rgba(255, 85, 85, 0.1);
            border-color: #ff5555;
            color: #ff5555;
        }
        .finding-warning {
            background-color: rgba(255, 184, 108, 0.1);
            border-color: #ffb86c;
            color: #ffb86c;
        }
        .finding-safe {
            background-color: rgba(80, 250, 123, 0.1);
            border-color: #50fa7b;
            color: #50fa7b;
        }
        .finding-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; }
        .finding-text { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 500; }
        
        .report-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 30px; }
        .report-header h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; }
        </style>
        <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.0.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.7/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.2/js/dataTables.buttons.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jszip/3.10.1/jszip.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.2/js/buttons.html5.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.2/js/buttons.print.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/buttons/2.4.2/js/buttons.colVis.min.js"></script>
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
#| echo: false
config_file = ".geol.yaml"
additional_context = ""
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
import subprocess
import shutil
import sys
import yaml
import json
import os
from datetime import datetime
import hashlib
from IPython.display import display, HTML, Markdown

# 1. Check if geol is installed
geol_path = shutil.which("geol")
if not geol_path:
    display(HTML("<h2><i class='fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation'></i> [CRITICAL ERROR] geol is NOT installed</h2>"))
    print("\nTo use this report, you must install `geol` first.")
    print("\nVisit [geol documentation](https://opt-nc.github.io/geol/docs/intro) for installation instructions.")
    sys.exit(1)

# Get versions
try:
    geol_version = subprocess.run(['geol', 'version'], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip()
    quarto_version = subprocess.run(['quarto', '--version'], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip()
    uv_version = subprocess.run(['uv', '--version'], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip().replace('uv ', '')
except:
    geol_version = quarto_version = uv_version = "Unknown"

# 2. Load Configuration and Data
if not os.path.exists(config_file):
    display(HTML(f"<h2><i class='fa-solid fa-file-circle-xmark'></i> [ERROR] Configuration file `{config_file}` not found.</h2>"))
    sys.exit(1)

with open(config_file, 'rb') as f:
    config_bytes = f.read()
    config_md5 = hashlib.md5(config_bytes).hexdigest()
    config_raw = config_bytes.decode('utf-8')
    config_data = yaml.safe_load(config_raw)

app_name = config_data.get('app_name', 'Unnamed Project')

# Run geol check
result = subprocess.run(['geol', 'check', config_file, '--json'], capture_output=True, text=True)
check_json = json.loads(result.stdout)
import pandas as pd
df_raw = pd.DataFrame(check_json['software_components'])

# Version Lag Analysis logic using packaging for robust comparison
from packaging.version import Version, parse

def calculate_lag(row):
    cur_str = str(row['version']).strip()
    lat_str = str(row['latest_version']).strip()
    
    if not lat_str or lat_str == '-' or not cur_str or cur_str == lat_str:
        return 'Current'
    
    try:
        cur_v = parse(cur_str)
        lat_v = parse(lat_str)
        
        # Robust comparison using packaging.version
        if lat_v > cur_v:
            # Check if major segment differs
            cur_major = getattr(cur_v, 'major', None)
            lat_major = getattr(lat_v, 'major', None)
            
            # If major exists and differs, it's a Major Lag
            if cur_major is not None and lat_major is not None and cur_major != lat_major:
                return 'Major Lag'
            
            # Fallback for versions without explicit .major (or if same major)
            # Check the first numeric part of the release tuple
            if cur_v.release and lat_v.release and cur_v.release[0] != lat_v.release[0]:
                return 'Major Lag'
                
            return 'Minor Lag'
        return 'Current'
    except:
        # Fallback to basic string split if parsing fails for very custom formats
        try:
            if cur_str.split('.')[0] != lat_str.split('.')[0]:
                return 'Major Lag'
            return 'Minor Lag'
        except:
            return 'Unknown'

df_raw['lag'] = df_raw.apply(calculate_lag, axis=1)

# Extract skipped products
skipped_products = [item for item in config_data.get('stack', []) if item.get('skip', False)]
if skipped_products:
    skipped_rows = [{'software': i.get('name', 'Unknown'), 'version': i.get('version', ''), 'status': 'UNKNOWN', 'eol_date': '', 'days': '', 'latest_version': '', 'is_latest': False, 'lag': 'Untracked'} for i in skipped_products]
    df_raw = pd.concat([df_raw, pd.DataFrame(skipped_rows)], ignore_index=True)

# Metrics
df_raw['days_num'] = pd.to_numeric(df_raw['days'], errors='coerce').fillna(9999)
total_comp = len(df_raw)
eol_comp = len(df_raw[df_raw['status'] == 'EOL'])
# Upcoming risks: not EOL yet but EOL within 180 days
upcoming_risks = df_raw[(df_raw['status'] == 'OK') & (df_raw['days_num'] > 0) & (df_raw['days_num'] < 180)]
upcoming_count = len(upcoming_risks)
ok_comp = len(df_raw[df_raw['status'] == 'OK']) - upcoming_count
untracked_comp = len(df_raw[df_raw['status'] == 'UNKNOWN'])

# Set Titles
print(f'<script>document.title = "{app_name} geol EoL stack reporting";</script>')
display(HTML(f'<div class="report-header"><h1><i class="fa-solid fa-hourglass-half"></i> {app_name} Geol EoL stack reporting</h1></div>'))

# Logo
logo_url = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opt-nc/geol/main/assets/logos/dist/logo-with-name-gradient-black.jpeg"
display(HTML(f'<div style="text-align: center; margin: 20px 0;"><a href="https://github.com/opt-nc/geol" target="_blank"><img src="{logo_url}" alt="Geol Logo" style="max-width: 300px; border-radius: 8px;"></a></div>'))

display(HTML("<h2><i class='fa-solid fa-circle-info'></i> Abstract</h2>"))
print(f"This report provides an EOL (End of Life) analysis for **{app_name}**. Generated using [geol](https://opt-nc.github.io/geol/).")

if additional_context and str(additional_context).strip():
    display(HTML(f"<h2><i class='fa-solid fa-note-sticky'></i> Additional context</h2>"))
    print(additional_context)

# --- BIG NUMBERS ---
metrics_html = f"""
<div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-top: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
    <div class="metric-card" style="flex: 1; min-width: 150px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-layer-group metric-icon"></i><span class="metric-label">Total Stack</span><span class="metric-value">{total_comp}</span></div>
    <div class="metric-card" style="flex: 1; min-width: 150px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check metric-icon status-ok"></i><span class="metric-label">Healthy</span><span class="metric-value status-ok">{ok_comp}</span></div>
    <div class="metric-card" style="flex: 1; min-width: 150px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation metric-icon status-warning"></i><span class="metric-label">Upcoming Risks</span><span class="metric-value status-warning">{upcoming_count}</span></div>
    <div class="metric-card" style="flex: 1; min-width: 150px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-fire-flame-curved metric-icon status-eol"></i><span class="metric-label">End of Life</span><span class="metric-value status-eol">{eol_comp}</span></div>
</div>
"""
display(HTML(metrics_html))

display(Markdown(f"""
- <i class='fa-solid fa-layer-group'></i> **Total Stack:** Represents the complete inventory of software components defined in your configuration.
- <i class='fa-solid fa-circle-check status-ok'></i> **Healthy:** Components that are currently supported and have a comfortable timeframe before EOL.
- <i class='fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation status-warning'></i> **Upcoming Risks:** Components reaching EOL within the next 180 days. Plan upgrades soon.
- <i class='fa-solid fa-fire-flame-curved status-eol'></i> **End of Life:** Critical items no longer receiving official updates. Immediate upgrade required.
- <i class='fa-solid fa-eye-slash status-skip'></i> **Untracked:** Components marked to be skipped (Total tracked = Total Stack - {untracked_comp}).
"""))

display(HTML("<h2><i class='fa-solid fa-database'></i> Report Metadata</h2>"))
now_local = datetime.now().astimezone()
from datetime import timezone as dt_timezone
now_utc = datetime.now(dt_timezone.utc)

metadata_html = f"""
<ul>
    <li><i class='fa-solid fa-clock'></i> <strong>Generation Date (Local):</strong> {now_local.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z (UTC%z)')}</li>
    <li><i class='fa-solid fa-earth-americas'></i> <strong>Generation Date (UTC):</strong> {now_utc.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')}</li>
    <li><i class='fa-brands fa-python'></i> <strong>Python Version:</strong> <code>{sys.version.split()[0]}</code></li>
    <li><i class='fa-solid fa-bolt'></i> <strong><a href='https://docs.astral.sh/uv/'>UV</a> Version:</strong> <code>{uv_version}</code></li>
    <li><i class='fa-solid fa-gears'></i> <strong><a href='https://opt-nc.github.io/geol/'>Geol</a> Version:</strong> <code>{geol_version}</code></li>
    <li><i class='fa-solid fa-book-open'></i> <strong><a href='https://quarto.org/'>Quarto</a> Version:</strong> <code>{quarto_version}</code></li>
    <li><i class='fa-solid fa-file-code'></i> <strong>Configuration File:</strong> <code>{config_file}</code></li>
    <li><i class='fa-solid fa-fingerprint'></i> <strong>Configuration MD5:</strong> <code>{config_md5}</code></li>
    <li><i class='fa-solid fa-link'></i> <strong>Data Source:</strong> <a href='https://endoflife.date/'>endoflife.date API</a></li>
</ul>
"""
display(HTML(metadata_html))
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
from IPython.display import display, HTML
display(HTML("<h2><i class='fa-solid fa-chart-pie'></i> Status Overview</h2>"))
import plotly.express as px
import pandas as pd

if not df_raw.empty:
    df_raw['Root'] = app_name
    # Create a display status for the chart
    def chart_status(row):
        if row['status'] == 'EOL': return 'EOL'
        if row['status'] == 'UNKNOWN': return 'Untracked'
        if row['days_num'] < 180: return 'Upcoming Risk'
        return 'Healthy'
    
    df_raw['Chart_Status'] = df_raw.apply(chart_status, axis=1)
    
    fig_sun = px.sunburst(df_raw, path=['Root', 'Chart_Status', 'software'], color='Chart_Status',
                          color_discrete_map={"EOL": "#ff5555", "Healthy": "#50fa7b", "Upcoming Risk": "#ffb86c", "Untracked": "#8be9fd"})
    fig_sun.update_layout(template="plotly_dark", paper_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)', plot_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)', margin=dict(t=0, b=0, l=0, r=0), height=450)
    display(fig_sun)
    
    # --- KEY FINDINGS ---
    findings_html = ""
    
    if eol_comp > 0:
        findings_html += f"""
        <div class="finding-box finding-critical">
            <div class="finding-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-fire-flame-curved"></i></div>
            <div class="finding-text"><strong>Critical Risk:</strong> {eol_comp} component{'s are' if eol_comp > 1 else ' is'} past the End-of-Life date. Immediate replacement is required.</div>
        </div>
        """
    
    if upcoming_count > 0:
        findings_html += f"""
        <div class="finding-box finding-warning">
            <div class="finding-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation"></i></div>
            <div class="finding-text"><strong>Upcoming Risk:</strong> {upcoming_count} component{'s' if upcoming_count > 1 else ''} will reach End-of-Life within 180 days.</div>
        </div>
        """
    
    if eol_comp == 0 and upcoming_count == 0:
        findings_html += """
        <div class="finding-box finding-safe">
            <div class="finding-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i></div>
            <div class="finding-text"><strong>All Clear:</strong> All tracked components are currently within their supported lifecycle.</div>
        </div>
        """

    display(HTML(findings_html))
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from IPython.display import display, HTML
display(HTML("<h2><i class='fa-solid fa-list-check'></i> Stack Status</h2>"))

try:
    name_to_id = {item.get('name'): item.get('id_eol') for item in config_data.get('stack', [])}
    df = df_raw.copy()
    
    # Custom Sorting: EOL first, then Upcoming, then OK, then Unknown
    def sort_rank(row):
        if row['status'] == 'EOL': return 0
        if row['status'] == 'OK' and row['days_num'] < 180: return 1
        if row['status'] == 'OK': return 2
        return 3
    
    df['sort_rank'] = df.apply(sort_rank, axis=1)
    df = df.sort_values(by=['sort_rank', 'days_num'], ascending=[True, True])

    def color_status(row):
        val = row['status']
        days = row['days_num']
        if val == 'EOL':
            return f'<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i> <span style="color:#ff5555; font-weight:bold;">{val}</span>'
        if val == 'UNKNOWN':
            return f'<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-question"></i> <span style="color:#8be9fd;">{val}</span>'
        if days < 180:
            return f'<i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation"></i> <span style="color:#ffb86c; font-weight:bold;">WARNING</span>'
        return f'<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i> <span style="color:#50fa7b;">{val}</span>'

    def style_lag(val):
        color = "#50fa7b" if val == 'Current' else "#ffb86c" if val == 'Minor Lag' else "#ff5555" if val == 'Major Lag' else "#8be9fd"
        icon = "fa-circle-check" if val == 'Current' else "fa-circle-chevron-up"
        return f'<span style="color:{color};"><i class="fa-solid {icon}"></i> {val}</span>'

    df['software_linked'] = df.apply(lambda x: f'<a href="https://endoflife.date/{name_to_id.get(x["software"], x["software"])}" target="_blank">{x["software"]}</a>' if x['status'] != 'UNKNOWN' else x['software'], axis=1)
    df['status_styled'] = df.apply(color_status, axis=1)
    df['lag_styled'] = df['lag'].apply(style_lag)
    
    headers = ['software_linked', 'version', 'status_styled', 'lag_styled', 'eol_date', 'latest_version']
    display_headers = ['Software', 'Version', 'Status', 'Version Lag', 'EOL Date', 'Latest']
    
    html_table = '<table id="stack-table" class="display table nowrap" style="width:100%"><thead><tr class="thead-dark">'
    for h in display_headers: html_table += f'<th>{h}</th>'
    html_table += '</tr></thead><tbody>'
    for _, row in df[headers].iterrows():
        html_table += '<tr>'
        for val in row: html_table += f'<td>{val}</td>'
        html_table += '</tr>'
    html_table += '</tbody></table>'
    
    dt_js = "<script>$(document).ready(function() { if ( ! $.fn.DataTable.isDataTable( '#stack-table' ) ) { $('#stack-table').DataTable({ dom: 'Bfrtip', buttons: ['copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'print', 'colvis'], pageLength: 15, responsive: true, order: [] }); } });</script>"
    display(HTML(html_table + dt_js))
except Exception as e: print(f"Error: {e}")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
from IPython.display import display, HTML
display(HTML("<h2><i class='fa-solid fa-calendar-days'></i> Lifecycle Timeline</h2>"))
import plotly.express as px
from datetime import datetime

lifecycle_events = []
today = datetime.now()
ids_to_check = list(set([item['id_eol'] for item in config_data.get('stack', []) if 'id_eol' in item and not item.get('skip', False)]))

for prod_id in ids_to_check:
    try:
        res = subprocess.run(['geol', 'product', 'extended', prod_id, '--json'], capture_output=True, text=True)
        if res.returncode == 0:
            data = json.loads(res.stdout)
            if data and len(data) > 0:
                product_info = data[0]
                for rel in product_info.get('releases', [])[:6]:
                    start, end, cycle = rel.get('releaseDate'), rel.get('eolFrom'), rel.get('cycle', 'unknown')
                    if start and end and end != "false":
                        try:
                            start_dt, end_dt = datetime.strptime(start, '%Y-%m-%d'), datetime.strptime(end, '%Y-%m-%d')
                            status = "EOL" if end_dt < today else "Active" if start_dt <= today <= end_dt else "Upcoming"
                            lifecycle_events.append({"Product": product_info['name'], "Cycle": str(cycle), "Start": start, "End": end, "Status": status, "Label": f"{product_info['name']} {cycle}"})
                        except: continue
    except: pass

if lifecycle_events:
    df_lc = pd.DataFrame(lifecycle_events)
    fig = px.timeline(df_lc, x_start="Start", x_end="End", y="Product", color="Status", hover_name="Label", text="Cycle",
                      color_discrete_map={"EOL": "#ff5555", "Active": "#50fa7b", "Upcoming": "#8be9fd"}, category_orders={"Status": ["Active", "Upcoming", "EOL"]})
    fig.update_yaxes(autorange="reversed")
    fig.update_layout(template="plotly_dark", paper_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)', plot_bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0)', height=400 + (len(df_lc['Product'].unique()) * 30), xaxis_title="")
    fig.add_vline(x=today.timestamp() * 1000, line_dash="dash", line_color="white")
    display(fig)
else: print("*No data available.*")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from IPython.display import display, HTML
display(HTML("<h2><i class='fa-solid fa-code'></i> Configuration Source</h2>"))
print(f"Built using `geol check` (see [tutorial](https://opt-nc.github.io/geol/docs/tutorial-basics/check-command) for more)\n```yaml\n{config_raw}\n```")
```

***

<div style="text-align: center; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 50px; opacity: 0.7;">
    <p><i class="fa-solid fa-code-fork"></i> <strong>Open Source & Customizable</strong></p>
    <p>This reporting notebook is open-source and part of the <a href="https://github.com/opt-nc/geol" target="_blank">geol project</a> ecosystem. You are encouraged to fork this repository and customize the analytics, visualizations, or styling to meet your organization's specific auditing and compliance needs.</p>
    <p><em>End-of-Life data is provided by the endoflife.date community API.</em></p>
</div>
